commit.message:
[FLINK-19411][task] Fix construction of MultipleInputStreamTask with union inputs

Previously number of input gates was assumed to be the same as number of logical
inputs, which is not true in case of union inputs.

[FLINK-19411][task] Fix construction of MultipleInputStreamTask with union inputs

Previously number of input gates was assumed to be the same as number of logical
inputs, which is not true in case of union inputs.

[FLINK-19098][json][csv] Make RowData CSV and JSON converters public

This closes #13303

Co-authored-by: Jark Wu <jark@apache.org>
